Items.Title: Cape Verde continue to surprise with entertaining Uruguay draw
Items.Description: Cape Verde's gripping debut World Cup campaign continued as they held two-time champions Uruguay to a thrilling draw in Miami.

Items.Title: One of World Cup's great stories - can Cape Verde become legends?
Items.Description: Cape Verde's impressive World Cup continues with a draw against two-time winners Uruguay - and they will now be looking to make the last 32.

Items.Title: They've done it again! Cape Verde claim another draw with Uruguay
Items.Description: Cape Verde continued their fairytale World Cup campaign as the African group of islands claimed a 2-2 draw with two-time winners Uruguay in Miami.

Items.Title: Federação Cabo-verdiana de Futebol
